interpretation: The headline Th1/Th2 verdict is reported at Rest, which is run-balanced (2 libraries each on CD4i_R1 and CD4i_R2). Stim48hr — the only run-confounded condition (all 4 libraries on CD4i_R2) — gives WEAKER cosines (0.53 vs 0.63), so it cannot be inflating the headline. Any Stim48hr-SPECIFIC claim remains run-confounded and should be flagged; the headline is safe.
